Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. MICHAEL HOGUE, ESQ. of Greenberg Traurig (Tel: 415-655-1303) specially appearing for defendant HSBC Bank Middle East Ltd;
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: Defendant HSBC Bank Middle East Limited's Motion to Quash.

Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Defendant HSBC Bank Middle East Limited's motion to quash is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

The Court instructs defense counsel to prepare and submit a proposed order to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano, CSR#8600, e-mail: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/EPS)

----

Court signs order submitted after hearing. (302/EPS)
